intro.title: `google/mcp`
intro.desc: This repository contains a list of Google's official Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, guidance on how to deploy MCP servers to Google Cloud, and examples to get started.

detalle.name: mcp
detalle.desc: This repository contains a list of Google's official Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, guidance on how to deploy MCP servers to Google Cloud, and examples to get started.
detalle.choose_if: necesitas exponer herramientas o contexto a agentes vía MCP
detalle.avoid_if: prefieres conexiones directas sin protocolo estándar
